title: helenium autumnale var. montanum
intro: Helenium autumnale var. montanum, also known as Mountain Sneezeweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to be effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The Mountain Sneezeweed is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and providing relief from allergies. Helenium autumnale var. montanum can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, tinctures, and salves, allowing for various methods of administration to harness its medicinal benefits.
